raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/2024 : XXXX XXXX sent a text message at XXXX XXXX saying there was purchase of a filter for {$47.00}. XXXX : Went to the XXXX XXXX website and tried to cancel as I had not made a purchase nor had put my card on file with them. Removed a stored AMEX credit card that was never allowed by me, especially since I had no subscriptions. Cancellation not allowed for filter. XXXX : XXXX contacted XXXX XXXX customer service chat. Confirmed there was no subscriptions but said I made purchase at that time. Then told it would be canceled. 


XX/XX/2024 : Submitted dispute to Amex stating card had been used fraudulently and asked for refund. Sent attachments of images texts from XX/XX/2024 XXXX XXXX Customer service chat stating that it would be cancelled. 

Amex declined my refund despite never allowing this charge nor use of my card. This is in violation of my agreement.
